description: fetch_payment_score_hip issues hipMemcpyAsync + hipStreamSynchronize before reading h_out[0]; the other two readers use a synchronous CPU copy. Unifying onto a shared reader that drops the stream sync returns uninitialised memory on the AMD MI300 checkout path.

findings.rationale: hipStreamSynchronize's return is discarded — the call's effect is on stream state. Constructor-side-effect family: same pattern as T066 (CUDA), T065 (NPU DMA), T029/T039 (lock_guard).
